name: ruTorrent
description: ruTorrent is a front-end for the popular BitTorrent client rTorrent. It provides a clean web interface with plugin support for managing torrents, monitoring download progress, and automating tasks via RSS feeds and watch directories.

default_credentials.password: Randomly generated — see ~/rutorrent.creds inside the container

notes.text: Web UI credentials (username and password) are stored in ~/rutorrent.creds inside the container.
The /RPC2 XMLRPC endpoint is disabled by default. Enable it during setup if you use Sonarr, Radarr, or autodl-irssi.
Real IP forwarding is disabled by default. Enable it during setup only if nginx is behind a reverse proxy (Traefik, Cloudflare, NPM, etc.).
